name: Simply Sensational Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Sour cream at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. Combine crumbs, sugar, and melted butter; press firmly on the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese until fluffy.
4. Gradually add sweetened condensed milk until smooth.
5. Add eggs and lemon juice; mix well.
6. Pour mixture into prepared pan.
7. Bake for 50 to 55 minutes or until center is set.
8. Cool completely and refrigerate leftovers.
Just before serving, remove the side of the springform pan and top with strawberries.
